5 months away from the light...ignore the message count.

Thank you guys for 21k! I didn't even realize we hit it 😭 I haven't really had the motivation to write, much less smut but Z and I are coming out with something soon (hopefully...) and I have another special treat in the works that I hope y'all like 🙏

Why is he so long

moving on,

I figured I would address this since it was shown to me:

Someone commented under one of Dhorrl's bots claiming that their bot was stolen from another creator (and Dhorrl's happened to inspired by one of my bots: temptation)

  1. [This] is the bot that someone is claiming Dhorrl and I copied, and I honestly don't know how someone even got that impression? They aren't even written similarly, nothing is copied:

  1. I don't want to sound mean when I say this but ovulation is not a unique or new prompt 😭 there's hundreds of fics with "reader is ovulating and char helps them deal with it" + ovulating is something all female bodied people go through, so I'm confused as to how this is "stealable", especially when it's a very common theme in ff

  2. To be blunt I did not steal anyone's work, neither was I inspired by anyone's work; in fact I started writing "temptation" before the other creator's bot was even posted 😭

(sorry for bad quality I took a picture of my laptop 💀)

anyways,

ENJOY!

Love,

Mama Down
